title: Haako
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Youmay|the [[Chadra-Fan/Legends|Chadra-Fan]]|[[Rune Haako/Legends|Rune Haako]]}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:Haako.jpg]] |name=Haako |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Chadra-Fan/Legends|Chadra-Fan]]{{CSWECite|II|3|Haako}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him''[[Legacy Era Campaign Guide]]'' |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Brown]][[Legacy (2006) 9|''Legacy'' (2006) 9]] |feathers= |eyes=Red |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Take another look, Haako. Be ''sure''.''"
"''Yeah, yeah, boss! It's him! I seen ''him''!|Jor Torlin and Haako, referring to Cade Skywalker|}} '''Haako''' was a [[Chadra-Fan/Legends|Chadra-Fan]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who worked as an [[Information broker/Legends|informant]] and [[Scout/Legends|scout]] during the [[Second Imperial Civil War]]. A long-[[Time/Legends|time]] inhabitant of [[The Wheel/Legends|the Wheel]] [[Space station/Legends|space station]], he kept no strict allegiance to any faction and worked for everyone who offered him [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] at a given time. In [[137 ABY]], he provided information about the former [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Cade Skywalker]] to [[Jor Torlin]], an [[Agent/Legends|agent]] for [[Sith Intelligence and Assassination]], confirming that Skywalker was aboard the [[Space station/Legends|space station]]. After this, Haako proceeded to use his network of informants in an effort to determine Skywalker's location, per Torlin's instructions. ==Biography== {{Quote|I kept my eye on him like you said after I commed you about him! He ''was'' here, but he got in his ship a few hours back and took off! Couldn't find out where!''"
"''All right, Haako. Keep digging. See if anyone else was with him, knew him, might know where he was headed.|Haako and Jor Torlin, regarding Cade Skywalker|}} [[File:Digyoumouse.jpg|thumb|left|280px|Haako provided information on Cade Skywalker for agent Jor Torlin in 137 ABY.]] Haako, a [[Chadra-Fan/Legends|Chadra-Fan]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] at some point before the end of the [[Sith–Imperial War]]. After the war's [[Battle of Caamas|final battle]] in [[130 ABY]], Haako set up residence in [[The Wheel/Legends|the Wheel]], a large [[Space station/Legends|space station]] located in the [[Besh Gorgon system/Legends|Besh Gorgon system]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. During this [[Time/Legends|time]], he made his living as an [[Information broker/Legends|informant]] and [[Scout/Legends|scout]] for various employers, always willing to sell his information to anyone who could pay him in [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. Haako's services were used on occasion by the [[One Sith|Sith]] [[Agent/Legends|agent]] [[Jor Torlin]], a former [[Sith acolyte/Legends|Sith adept]] working for the [[Sith Intelligence and Assassination|intelligence division]] of [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]]. [[137 ABY|Seven years later]], during the [[Second Imperial Civil War]], Haako made contact to inform Torlin that the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] and former [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Cade Skywalker]], for whom the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Darth Krayt]] was searching, was aboard the Wheel. The Chadra-Fan was instructed by Torlin to keep track of Skywalker's whereabouts. However, Skywalker left the station and Haako was unable to ascertain the [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] [[Hunting/Legends|hunter's]] destination. Haako met with Torlin, who gave the Chadra-Fan a [[Flimsiplast/Legends|flimsiplast]] of Skywalker's portrait to confirm whether Haako had seen the same individual. Haako confirmed this and then left Torlin after being instructed by the agent to keep searching for Skywalker's location and to find out if he had been seen with any companions. Haako used his structure of informers in an attempt to find Skywalker. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|You can count on me, boss!|Haako, to Jor Torlin|}} Haako was an enthusiastic individual whose loyalty was for sale, depending on the amount of credits a potential employer was offering. He made sure he was cognizant of the people who visited the Wheel, always seeking to use his information as a potential means of income. He could speak and understand [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] and the [[Chadra-Fan (language)/Legends|Chadra-Fan]]. He had [[Color/Legends|Brown]] hair and red eyes. ==Equipment== Haako possessed a [[Hold-out blaster/Legends|hold-out blaster]] pistol, a [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]], a [[Credit chip/Legends|credit chip]], and a [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]]. ==Behind the scenes== Haako first appeared in the [[Legacy (2006) 9|ninth issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars: Legacy]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] series. The issue was written by [[John Ostrander]], illustrated by [[Colin Wilson (artist)|Colin Wilson]], and released on [[March 7]], [[2007]].{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54381/star_wars_legacy_2006_9|text=Star Wars: Legacy (2006) #9}} ==Appearances== *[[Legacy (2006) 9|''Legacy'' (2006) 9]] {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[Legacy Era Campaign Guide]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Haako}} {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Haako |es=Haako |pl=Haako }} [[Category:Chadra-Fan]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Information brokers]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Scouts]] [[Category:Sith minions]]
